overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character jogging along a sandy beach and onto a rocky pier extending into the ocean, with a modern city skyline visible in the background. The scene transitions from beach vegetation to open water views as the character progresses along the breakwater.

entered.detail: cluster of modern high-rise buildings with glass facades
tallest building in the skyline with reflective glass windows
tall brownish beach grass and shrubs lining the path
sandy ground surface with footprints and tire tracks

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a sandy beach path with a modern city skyline visible in the background to the left. Beach vegetation lines the right side of the path as the ocean becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky pier entrance with concrete markers

events.description: transition from sandy beach to rocky pier surface
text overlay 'SOUTH POINTE PIER' appears identifying the location

agents.ego_description: entering the rocky pier area with triangular concrete markers visible ahead

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground transitioning from sand to stone
triangular concrete structures marking the pier entrance
calm blue ocean water visible to the right

segments.scene_description: Transitioning onto the rocky South Pointe Pier, the character moves from sand to uneven stone surface. Triangular concrete markers flank the entrance as the text overlay identifies the location, with the city skyline receding behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky breakwater pier with concrete bunkers

events.description: large concrete bunker structures appear on both sides of the pier

agents.ego_description: navigating along the narrow rocky pier with large concrete structures passing by on either side

entered.detail: massive concrete block structures resembling bunkers

segments.scene_description: Moving along the narrow rocky breakwater, the character passes large concrete bunker-like structures on both sides. The pier extends straight into the calm ocean with clear blue water visible on all sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean pier extending to horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the endless rocky pier with open ocean views on both sides toward the horizon

entered.detail: distant horizon where the ocean meets the sky

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the endless rocky pier toward the horizon, the character traverses the open breakwater with expansive ocean views. The concrete structures have passed, leaving only the rocky path extending into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vegetated sandy beach toward the open horizon of a rocky pier. It begins with the character jogging along a sandy path flanked by beach vegetation, with a modern city skyline visible in the distance to the left. As the character transitions onto the South Pointe Pier, the terrain shifts from sand to an uneven stone surface marked by triangular concrete pillars while the city skyline recedes behind. The scene then narrows as the camera moves along the breakwater past large concrete bunker-like structures, with the environment opening up to reveal calm blue water on all sides. Finally, the path clears of structures, leaving only the endless rocky pier extending straight into the expansive ocean toward the horizon.
